steps.title: Identify below-line points
steps.content: The line of best fit gives the predicted $y$-value. It predicts a greater $y$-value than the actual data point exactly when the plotted point is below the line.

steps.title: Count the matching points
steps.content: Scan the $11$ points and count the points below the line. There are $6$ such points. The answer is 6.
